annotations.label: Poisson manifold

anchor.snippet: a Poisson manifold is a smooth manifold endowed with a Poisson structure

annotations.note: Mathlib has no Poisson manifolds; Mathlib/Algebra/Lie/NonUnitalNonAssocAlgebra.lean explicitly notes Poisson algebras are 'not yet defined'.

annotations.note: No Poisson structure/bracket on smooth manifolds is defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Quotient of symplectic manifold by symplectomorphisms

anchor.snippet: the smooth quotient of a symplectic manifold by a group acting by symplectomorphisms is a Poisson manifold

annotations.note: Neither symplectic manifolds nor symplectomorphism quotients exist in Mathlib.
